message.content:
I need to find ALL frontend/client code related to the "Universe" feature in this project at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3. This includes:

1. Any components in `client/src/components/` related to Universe (folder name, file names)
2. Any routes in the React Router config that point to `/universe` or universe-related paths
3. Any API functions in `client/API/` that call universe endpoints
4. Any imports of Universe components in other files (especially Home.jsx, App.jsx, routing files)
5. Any sidebar/navigation links that reference "Universe" (I already see one in Home.jsx with `universeLink`)
6. Any CSS files for Universe components

For each file found, note:
- The full file path  
- What it does
- What other files import it (critical for safe removal)

Search for "universe", "galaxy", "Universe", "Galaxy" across the entire client/ directory. Be very thorough.

content.text: Perfect! Now let me verify the hook that uses constellation functions:

Excellent! Now I have a complete picture. Let me create a comprehensive report of all the Universe feature code:

## COMPREHENSIVE UNIVERSE FEATURE SEARCH REPORT

I have completed a thorough search of the entire `client/` directory for all Universe and Galaxy-related code. Here's what I found:

---

### **MAIN COMPONENT**

**1. Universe Main Component**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.jsx`
- **Size:** 55.9 KB
- **Purpose:** The main interactive universe visualization component using React Konva with canvas rendering. Displays posts as stars in a 2D space with constellations (user-created links between stars). Features include:
  - Interactive camera/zoom controls
  - Rocket mode for navigation
  - Star clustering/gravity simulation
  - Constellation request/management
  - Minimap navigation
- **Key Imports:**
  - API: `getUniversePosts`, `getUserData`, `getViewportConstellations`
  - All sub-components (layers, hooks, utilities listed below)

---

### **STYLING**

**2. CSS Module**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.module.css`
- **Size:** 28 KB
- **Contains:** All CSS classes for universe visualization including `.universeContainer`, `.backButton`, joystick styles, minimap styles, HUD elements, etc.

---

### **SUB-COMPONENTS (7 files)**

**3. ConstellationPanel.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\ConstellationPanel.jsx`
- **Purpose:** Displays pending/accepted constellation requests as post cards with read/fly-to actions

**4. UniverseMinimap.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\UniverseMinimap.jsx`
- **Size:** 7.9 KB
- **Purpose:** Minimap visualization showing all visible stars in the universe viewport

**5. RocketHUD.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\RocketHUD.jsx`
- **Size:** 5.8 KB
- **Purpose:** Heads-up display for rocket mode with virtual joystick and throttle controls

**6. VirtualJoystick.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\VirtualJoystick.jsx`
- **Size:** 3.7 KB
- **Purpose:** Touch-friendly analog joystick for rocket navigation

**7. TouchThrottle.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\TouchThrottle.jsx`
- **Size:** 2.4 KB
- **Purpose:** Throttle control for rocket speed

**8. StarGroup.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\StarGroup.jsx`
- **Size:** 5.7 KB
- **Purpose:** Renders grouped stars (clusters of posts)

**9. Nebula.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\Nebula.jsx`
- **Size:** 1.1 KB
- **Purpose:** Nebula (dust cloud) visual effects

---

### **LAYERS (7 files)**

All layer components use Konva for canvas rendering:

**10. ConstellationLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\ConstellationLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 11.7 KB
- **Purpose:** Renders constellation links (lines between user stars) with interactive modes

**11. InteractiveLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\InteractiveLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 9.8 KB
- **Purpose:** Main interactive layer for star clicks, hover states, and post interactions

**12. RocketLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\RocketLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 12.1 KB
- **Purpose:** Rocket visualization and flight trajectory rendering

**13. NebulaLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\NebulaLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 7.5 KB
- **Purpose:** Nebula cloud effects for visual depth

**14. WormholeLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\WormholeLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 9.6 KB
- **Purpose:** Wormhole visual effects between constellations

**15. MidGalaxyLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\MidGalaxyLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 1.6 KB
- **Purpose:** Mid-range galaxy backdrop rendering

**16. DeepSpaceLayer.jsx**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\DeepSpaceLayer.jsx`
- **Size:** 1.6 KB
- **Purpose:** Deep space background layer (stars far in distance)

---

### **HOOKS (4 files)**

**17. useUniverseCamera.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useUniverseCamera.js`
- **Size:** 11.4 KB
- **Purpose:** Manages camera position, zoom, and pan controls for the universe view

**18. useCosmicGravity.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useCosmicGravity.js`
- **Size:** 9.6 KB
- **Purpose:** Computes gravity-based attraction between star clusters for visual grouping

**19. useRocketMode.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useRocketMode.js`
- **Size:** 32 KB
- **Purpose:** Complex rocket physics simulation including velocity, acceleration, and trajectory

**20. useConstellationLinkMode.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useConstellationLinkMode.js`
- **Size:** 2.8 KB
- **Purpose:** Manages the constellation link creation workflow (selecting two stars, submitting link request)
- **Uses API:** `requestConstellation` from `Api.js`

---

### **UTILITIES (7 files)**

**21. starUtils.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\starUtils.js`
- **Exports:** `STAR_COLORS`, `MIN_UNIVERSE_ZOOM`, `MAX_UNIVERSE_ZOOM`, `userHomeCoords()`, `getStarColor()`, `getStarRadius()`, `extractSnippet()`, `hexToRgba()`

**22. cosmicPhysics.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\cosmicPhysics.js`
- **Size:** 18.4 KB
- **Purpose:** Computes spatial clustering, sector indexing, gravity pull offsets, centroid calculations

**23. galaxyVisuals.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\galaxyVisuals.js`
- **Purpose:** Galaxy visual rendering utilities

**24. constellationUtils.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\constellationUtils.js`
- **Exports:** `computeConstellationChains()`, `assignChainColors()`
- **Purpose:** Groups constellation links into chains and assigns consistent colors

**25. proceduralGeneration.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\proceduralGeneration.js`
- **Size:** 1.8 KB
- **Purpose:** Procedural generation for background/nebula elements

**26. coordConversion.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\coordConversion.js`
- **Purpose:** Coordinate conversion utilities (likely world to screen space)

**27. embeddingToColor.js**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\utils\embeddingToColor.js`
- **Size:** 1.3 KB
- **Purpose:** Converts semantic embeddings to colors for visual representation

---

### **API FUNCTIONS (in `client/API/Api.js`)**

**28. getUniversePosts(minX, maxX, minY, maxY, limit = 200)**
- **Line:** 1188-1205
- **Purpose:** Fetches posts within a viewport rectangle for rendering in universe
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/universe/posts`

**29. getViewportConstellations(postIds)**
- **Line:** 1151-1185
- **Purpose:** Fetches constellation data for given post IDs
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/constellation/viewport`

**30. requestConstellation(token, starIdA, starIdB, label)**
- **Purpose:** Creates a new constellation link request between two posts
- **Endpoint:** `POST /api/constellation/request`
- **Used by:** `useConstellationLinkMode.js`

**31. respondConstellation(token, constellationId, accept)**
- **Purpose:** Accepts or rejects a pending constellation link request
- **Endpoint:** `POST /api/constellation/respond`
- **Used by:** `useMutation.js` (line 3)

**32. deleteConstellation(token, constellationId)**
- **Purpose:** Deletes an existing constellation link
- **Endpoint:** `DELETE /api/constellation/{constellationId}`

---

### **ROUTING**

**33. App.jsx Route Definition**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\App.jsx`
- **Line:** 37
- **Route:** `<Route path='/universe' element={<Universe/>}/>`
- **Import:** `const Universe = lazy(() => import('./components/Universe/Universe.jsx'));` (Line 37)

---

### **NAVIGATION/SIDEBAR LINKS (4 files)**

**34. Home.jsx - universeLink**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\Home.jsx`
- **Lines:** 94-111
- **Purpose:** Sidebar navigation link to `/universe` with custom star constellation icon
- **Included in:** `links` array (lines 199-200) for both guest and authenticated users

**35. MobileNavLink.jsx - Universe Navigation**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\mobileNavLink\MobileNavLink.jsx`
- **Lines:** 64-83
- **Purpose:** Mobile bottom nav link to `/universe` with responsive icon
- **Included in:** `navLinks` array (line 25)

**36. profileSidebarLinks.jsx - Universe Link**
- **Path:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\constants\profileSidebarLinks.jsx`
- **Lines:** 35-52
- **Purpose:** Profile page sidebar navigation link to `/universe`
